1	package bead
     2	
     3	import (
     4		"fmt"
     5		"testing"
     6	
     7		"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
     8		"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
     9	)
    10	
    11	type backendConformanceCase struct {
    12		name string
    13		make func(*testing.T) *Store
    14	}
    15	
    16	func backendConformanceCases() []backendConformanceCase {
    17		return []backendConformanceCase{
    18			{name: "jsonl", make: newTestStore},
    19			{name: "axon", make: newAxonStore},
    20		}
    21	}
    22	
    23	func runBackendConformanceSuite(t *testing.T, tc backendConformanceCase) {
    24		t.Helper()
    25	
    26		t.Run("create-get", func(t *testing.T) {
    27			t.Parallel()
    28			s := tc.make(t)
    29	
    30			b := &Bead{Title: "first", Description: "round-trip"}
    31			require.NoError(t, s.Create(b))
    32			require.NotEmpty(t, b.ID)
    33	
    34			got, err := s.Get(b.ID)
    35			require.NoError(t, err)
    36			assert.Equal(t, "first", got.Title)
    37			assert.Equal(t, "round-trip", got.Description)
    38			assert.Equal(t, StatusOpen, got.Status)
    39		})
    40	
    41		t.Run("update", func(t *testing.T) {
    42			t.Parallel()
    43			s := tc.make(t)
    44	
    45			b := &Bead{Title: "to-update"}
    46			require.NoError(t, s.Create(b))
    47	
    48			require.NoError(t, s.Update(b.ID, func(bb *Bead) {
    49				bb.Notes = "added by update"
    50				bb.Priority = 3
    51			}))
    52	
    53			got, err := s.Get(b.ID)
    54			require.NoError(t, err)
    55			assert.Equal(t, "added by update", got.Notes)
    56			assert.Equal(t, 3, got.Priority)
    57		})
    58	
    59		t.Run("claim", func(t *testing.T) {
    60			t.Parallel()
    61			s := tc.make(t)
    62	
    63			b := &Bead{Title: "claimable"}
    64			require.NoError(t, s.Create(b))
    65	
    66			require.NoError(t, s.Claim(b.ID, "alice"))
    67			got, err := s.Get(b.ID)
    68			require.NoError(t, err)
    69			assert.Equal(t, StatusInProgress, got.Status)
    70			assert.Equal(t, "alice", got.Owner)
    71			require.NotNil(t, got.Extra)
    72			assert.NotEmpty(t, got.Extra["claimed-at"])
    73	
    74			err = s.Claim(b.ID, "bob")
    75			require.Error(t, err)
    76	
    77			require.NoError(t, s.Unclaim(b.ID))
    78			got, err = s.Get(b.ID)
    79			require.NoError(t, err)
    80			assert.Equal(t, StatusOpen, got.Status)
    81			assert.Empty(t, got.Owner)
    82		})
    83	
    84		t.Run("deps", func(t *testing.T) {
    85			t.Parallel()
    86			s := tc.make(t)
    87	
    88			root := &Bead{Title: "root"}
    89			child := &Bead{Title: "child"}
    90			require.NoError(t, s.Create(root))
    91			require.NoError(t, s.Create(child))
    92	
    93			require.NoError(t, s.DepAdd(child.ID, root.ID))
    94			got, err := s.Get(child.ID)
    95			require.NoError(t, err)
    96			require.Len(t, got.Dependencies, 1)
    97			assert.Equal(t, root.ID, got.Dependencies[0].DependsOnID)
    98	
    99			tree, err := s.DepTree(root.ID)
   100			require.NoError(t, err)
   101			assert.Contains(t, tree, root.ID)
   102	
   103			require.NoError(t, s.DepRemove(child.ID, root.ID))
   104			got, err = s.Get(child.ID)
   105			require.NoError(t, err)
   106			assert.Empty(t, got.Dependencies)
   107		})
   108	
   109		t.Run("events-close", func(t *testing.T) {
   110			t.Parallel()
   111			s := tc.make(t)
   112	
   113			b := &Bead{Title: "with-events"}

   115

   400	// TestAxonBackend_JSONLImportExportRoundTrip verifies the bd/br interchange
   401	// contract: a bead exported through the axon-backed store and re-imported
   402	// re-creates the same bead corpus. This is the AC §"JSONL export/import for
   403	// bd/br round-trip" knot.
   404	func TestAxonBackend_JSONLImportExportRoundTrip(t *testing.T) {
   405		t.Parallel()
   406		src := newAxonStore(t)
   407	
   408		// Seed a small corpus with deps + events.
   409		a := &Bead{Title: "alpha"}
   410		bb := &Bead{Title: "beta"}
   411		require.NoError(t, src.Create(a))
   412		require.NoError(t, src.Create(bb))
   413		require.NoError(t, src.DepAdd(bb.ID, a.ID))
   414		require.NoError(t, src.AppendEvent(a.ID, BeadEvent{Kind: "k", Summary: "s"}))
   415	
   416		var buf bytes.Buffer
   417		require.NoError(t, src.ExportTo(&buf))
   418		require.NotZero(t, buf.Len())
   419	
   420		// Write the export to a temp file and import into a fresh axon-backed
   421		// store. The expected count should equal the source corpus.
   422		jsonlPath := filepath.Join(t.TempDir(), "exported.jsonl")
   423		require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(jsonlPath, buf.Bytes(), 0o644))
   424	
   425		dst := newAxonStore(t)
   426		count, err := dst.Import("jsonl", jsonlPath)
   427		require.NoError(t, err)
   428		assert.Equal(t, 2, count)
   429	
   430		gotA, err := dst.Get(a.ID)
   431		require.NoError(t, err)
   432		assert.Equal(t, "alpha", gotA.Title)
   433	
   434		gotB, err := dst.Get(bb.ID)
   435		require.NoError(t, err)
   436		assert.Equal(t, "beta", gotB.Title)
   437		require.Len(t, gotB.Dependencies, 1)
   438		assert.Equal(t, a.ID, gotB.Dependencies[0].DependsOnID)
   439	}
